arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczęsny speaks out on Barcelona situation and potential debut
arts.sum: Barcelona star Wojciech Szczęsny has on Friday provided an insight into his current situation at the club. Goalkeeper Szczęsny, of course, put pen to paper on a short-term deal with…

arts.ttl: Raphinha & Kounde explain reasons for Barca’s patchy form
arts.sum: Raphinha has been talking about the reasons for Barcelona’s patchy form after seeing the team drop points in recent weeks against the likes of Las Palmas, Betis and Leganes. The Brazilian, who has been Barcelona’s leading light this season, says the players must take responsibility and feels tiredness has played a part.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: There’s a massive game at the top of the La Liga table on Saturday night as Barcelona host Atletico Madrid. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predi...

arts.ttl: ‘How?’ – Barcelona warned they ‘made a mistake’ in allowing youngster to leave
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have this week seen a recent piece of outgoing transfer business called into serious question. This comes amid claims that the Blaugrana brass made a mistake…

arts.ttl: Why Barcelona Are Suddenly Struggling in La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona's struggles in La Liga could result in Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid overtaking them in the standings before the end of the year.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s $1.8 billion Nike deal goes to a vote
arts.sum: Barcelona’s current Nike deal has been valued at $112 million per year, and was due to expire in June 2028. SportsPro reports that Barcelona will earn $132 million per year from Nike, surpassing all other manufacturing deals in soccer.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star secures another La Liga award nomination
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal has on Friday seen his excellence across the month to date recognised by La Liga. This comes amid confirmation that the 17-year-old has been included on…

arts.ttl: Brighton man details previous Atletico Madrid interest – Still keeping a close eye on former club
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion midfielder Mats Wieffer has admitted he was on Atletico Madrid’s radar in the past, but nothing concrete came of it. 1908.nl cover comments from the Brighton midfielder today in which he also admits he’s keeping a close eye on former club Feyenoord from the south coast. arts.ttl: Diego Simeone singles one Barcelona star out for special praise before La Liga showdown
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid head coach Diego Simeone has today moved to reveal his appreciation for a leading member of the attacking ranks at Barcelona. The player in question? Raphinha. Wide-man Raphinha,…

arts.ttl: Flick talks Yamal, Lewandowski, Barça’s form and Atlético
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick spoke to the press on Friday ahead of Saturday’s monster La Liga clash against Atlético Madrid, with the winner going into the holiday break at the top of the table and earning huge momentum ahead of the second half of the season. Now they have to face a scorching hot Atlético side that has won 11 games in a row in all competitions, and Diego Simeone’s side will look to take advantage of Barça’s dip in form and move into first place.
